Shakti Pumps (India) Limited has informed the Exchange that Company has received a Letter of Empanelment from Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company Limited for 15,000 Off-Grid Solar Photovoltaic Water Pumping Systems (SPWPS) pumps under Magel Tyala Saur Krushi Pump Yojana. The total value of the 15,000 pumps is around Rs. 353.89 Crores (inclusive of GST). |SUBJECT: Bagging/Receiving of orders/contracts
